coverage: producer preserves all non-target masks and applies fixed square-3x3 one-iteration upper-lip dilation
new pixels claimed by mouth or lower-lip predictions are excluded
evaluator independently recomputes the candidate and rejects parameter, source hash, exclusion hash, output, and non-target drift
candidate composer rejects source prediction hash drift, nonempty output destinations, and records model_route_executed=false
neck novelty applies only when neck is explicitly claimed in candidate_target_classes
claim_boundary: Disposable contract regression only; metric and visual acceptance are recorded separately.
